PokerStars Hand #TEST001: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02 USD) - 2026/02/15 10:00:00 ET
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #4 is the button
Seat 1: HeroPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain3 ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 5: SBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 6: BBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
SBPlayer: posts small blind $0.01
BBPlayer: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to HeroPlayer [Ah Kd]
HeroPlayer: raises $0.06 to $0.06
Villain1: folds
Villain2: folds
Villain3: folds
SBPlayer: folds
BBPlayer: folds
Uncalled bet ($0.04) returned to HeroPlayer
HeroPlayer collected $0.05 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.05 | Rake $0
Seat 1: HeroPlayer collected ($0.05)
